criteria.text: `verdi close <story>` folds only `source: ci` evidence, verifies eligibility, freezes the alignment report, generates a valid `rollup.json`, and archives the frozen quartet (spec, layout.json, rollup.json, deviation-report.md) to specs/archive/ — demonstrated end to end on a real merged verdi story
the closed story's rollup publishes to the configured tracker and reads back through it (the round-6 hermetic fake provider), reaching the publish step for real

verdi's self-hosted stories earn CI static + behavioral evidence — a `make verify`-derived behavioral record and a static record, each `source: ci` and bound by (story, AC) through verdi.bindings.yaml — so the fold reaches evidenced and D6-4 is closed (the runtime kind is completed by the runtime-evidence story)
